CIPHER.1264.cipherString: A good deed is never lost; he who sows respect reaps friendship, and he who plants kindness gathers love.
CIPHER.1264.question: A phrase by Basil has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1264.author: Basil

CIPHER.1265.cipherString: Don't tell me the sky's the limit when there are footprints on the moon.
CIPHER.1265.question: The message below was intercepted from an experimental satellite transmission. It contains a quote by Paul Brandt, encoded as an Atbash. What does it say?
CIPHER.1265.author: Paul Brandt

CIPHER.1266.cipherString: I prefer to think of myself as a musician who is still learning and trying to do something every time out.
CIPHER.1266.question: The marching band's sheet music rearranged itself into this pattern—it's a quote by Geddy Lee encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1266.author: Geddy Lee

CIPHER.1267.cipherString: And it is long since I have learned to hold popular opinion of no value.
CIPHER.1267.question: The following quote by Alexander Hamilton needs to be decoded with the Porta Cipher using a keyword of GROWTH. What does it say?
CIPHER.1267.author: Alexander Hamilton

CIPHER.1268.cipherString: It is a strange habit of wise humanity to speak in enigmas only.
CIPHER.1268.question: Hidden in the margin of a library book on black holes: decode this Nihilist Substitution version of Ruskin's words with a keyword of PUZZLE and polybius key of CUSTOMIZATIONS. What does it say?
CIPHER.1268.author: Ruskin

CIPHER.1269.cipherString: A multitude of small delights constitute happiness.
CIPHER.1269.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote by Charles Baudelaire, written in a Baconian Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1269.author: Charles Baudelaire

CIPHER.1270.cipherString: The sports page records people's accomplishments, the front page usually records nothing but man's failures.
CIPHER.1270.question: Printed in the back of your local newspaper you find this strange code—it's actually Barbara Walters's quote encoded as a Caesar cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1270.author: Barbara Walters

CIPHER.1271.cipherString: My drink is a river. The place where I sleep is a place of reed mats.
CIPHER.1271.question: Hidden inside your fortune cookie was a Sumerian proverb encoded using a Nihilist Substitution cipher with a keyword length of 5. The 19th through 28th cipher units (86 62 46 46 52 95 34 43 65 52) decode to be PLACE WHERE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1271.author: Sumerian proverbs

CIPHER.1272.cipherString: In science read the newest works; in literature, the oldest.
CIPHER.1272.question: This coded passage was discovered in the margin of a physics exam from years ago. It's a quote by Bulwer Lytton, encrypted as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has READ in it corresponding to the encoded text Y G N O P W, meaning G = –●×; N = ●×●; O = –×–; P = ●●×; W = ×–×; Y = ××●. What does it say?
CIPHER.1272.author: Bulwer Lytton

CIPHER.1273.cipherString: The covers of this book are too far apart.
CIPHER.1273.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Ambrose Bierce, written as a Baconian Cipher. You are told that the cipher text DAILY SIXTH CHESS LEVEL decodes to be THIS. What does it say?
CIPHER.1273.author: Ambrose Bierce

CIPHER.1274.cipherString: Esta mañana he bajado al supermercado de mi barrio para hacer la compra a mis abuelos y a sus dos vecinos.
CIPHER.1274.question: This is a Spanish-language passage from someone's diary entry. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to solve.

CIPHER.1275.cipherString: Eggs and oaths are easily broken.
CIPHER.1275.question: At midnight the printer spits out a Danish Proverb encrypted with an Affine cipher with a=9 and b=10. What does it say?
CIPHER.1275.author: Danish Proverb

CIPHER.1276.cipherString: Facts are to the mind the same thing as food to the body.
CIPHER.1276.question: A weathered note is found inside an old science textbook. The writing appears to be a quote by Burke encoded as a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.1276.author: Burke

CIPHER.1277.cipherString: To understand what you read you must first understand the mind in which they grew.
CIPHER.1277.question: Found inside a hollowed-out periodic table book: this Checkerboard Cipher hides Anthony T. Hincks's insight with a polybius key of ASSESSMENT. What does it say?
CIPHER.1277.author: Anthony T. Hincks

CIPHER.1278.cipherString: I liked math - that was my favorite subject - and I was very interested in astronomy and in physical science.
CIPHER.1278.question: Scratched onto the lens of an abandoned telescope, decode this Aristocrat quote by Sally Ride. What does it say?
CIPHER.1278.author: Sally Ride

CIPHER.1279.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be encoded as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 902038 180246 decode to?

CIPHER.1280.cipherString: I had a great movement teacher - he showed me how to walk so I wasn't becoming like a cartoon.
CIPHER.1280.question: Solve this quote by John Leguizamo that has been encoded using the Atbash Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1280.author: John Leguizamo

CIPHER.1281.cipherString: The sky is low, the clouds are mean
CIPHER.1281.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Affine encoded quote. You are told that the cipher text KC decodes to be IS. What does it say?

CIPHER.1282.cipherString: Accept situations without hesitation and allow things to flow naturally in whatever direction they want.
CIPHER.1282.question: A glitch in the school's grading portal displayed this Caesar string by Shree Shambav. What does it say?
CIPHER.1282.author: Shree Shambav

CIPHER.1283.cipherString: Ellos no deben ir en persona porque son personas de alto riesgo y también tienen problemas de movilidad.
CIPHER.1283.question: This Spanish-language excuse has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to solve.

CIPHER.1284.question: A mysterious QR code on the back of a cereal box leads to this encrypted quote using the Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 0824965 417674 decode to?

CIPHER.1285.cipherString: The gentle glow of fireflies, which carries the magic of childhood dreams, sparks our sense of wonder and nostalgia.
CIPHER.1285.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote about insects by Shree Shambav, encrypted using a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains NOSTA on the last line corresponding to ciphertext EBQRG. You are also told that there are more than 4 Rs in the cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1285.author: Shree Shambav

CIPHER.1286.cipherString: Melting icicles; once proud soldiers, lose all form; returning to streams.
CIPHER.1286.question: A poem in a bottle washed up in the school's decorative fountain—decode this Complete Columnar cipher text which is a quote from a movie. The quote has LOSE somewhere in it. What does it say?

CIPHER.1287.cipherString: Most of the shadows of life are caused by standing in our own sunshine.
CIPHER.1287.question: While analyzing the background noise from a physics experiment, you detect this pattern. It's a quote by Ralph Waldo Emerson, encoded using a Porta. The 26th through 30th cipher characters (YQHET) decode to be CAUSE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1287.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

CIPHER.1288.cipherString: Science cannot tell us a word about why music delights us, of why and how an old song can move us to tears.
CIPHER.1288.question: Etched into the surface of a melted vinyl record, you found this Aristocrat-encrypted quote by Erwin Schrödinger. What does it say?
CIPHER.1288.author: Erwin Schrödinger

CIPHER.1289.cipherString: Most of what humans understand about light is nothing, which is not their fault. Humans aren't supposed to know it all.
CIPHER.1289.question: Your solar-powered calculator started flashing this Patristocrat sequence—it's Laurie Perez's words about physics using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains HUMAN in the first line corresponding to the ciphertext letters ELHSI. What does it say?
CIPHER.1289.author: Laurie Perez

CIPHER.1290.cipherString: Geography is just physics slowed down, with a couple of trees stuck in it.
CIPHER.1290.question: A famous phrase has been encoded as a Checkerboard cipher. The 37th through 45th cipher units (WS WO AA WA CH TS WC AA TC) decode to be ACOUPLEOF. What does it say?

CIPHER.1291.cipherString: Without public trust, law enforcement can't do its job serving and protecting all the communities.
CIPHER.1291.question: Joe Biden offers an observation that has been encoded as a K1 Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1291.author: Joe Biden

CIPHER.1292.cipherString: A proverb is the wisdom of many and the wit of one.
CIPHER.1292.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote by Lord John Russell, written as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has IS THE in it corresponding to the encoded text Q Q D M P U, meaning D = ●××; M = –×●; P = ●●●; Q = ×●●; U = ×●×. What does it say?
CIPHER.1292.author: Lord John Russell

CIPHER.1293.cipherString: Society bristles with enigmas which look hard to solve. It is a perfect maze of intrigue.
CIPHER.1293.question: The message below was encoded into the DNA sequence of a synthetic organism. It translates to a quote by Honore de Balzac, encrypted using a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has PERFECT somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1293.author: Honore de Balzac
